body: Amara, thanks for the quick turnaround on the term sheet feedback — really appreciated the detailed notes, especially on the pro-rata provisions. I wanted to follow up on our conversation about [Verdant Systems](companies/verdant-systems), specifically whether [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) would be open to co-leading the Series A alongside us given your climate infrastructure thesis. We've been digging into their grid-edge compute stack over the past few weeks and I think the technical moat is stronger than it first appeared, particularly on the thermal management side. Would love to sync later this week if you have a slot — I'm thinking a 30-minute call to align on valuation framing before we go back to the founders. Let me know what works.
